authProvider.promptMessage: What {{ colors.blue('Authentication Provider') }} would you like to use?

choices.title: Husky
choices.description: Modern native git hooks made easy. (Necessary for Lint Staged and Nano Staged)

choices.title: Lint Staged
choices.description: Run linters against staged git files and don't let 💩 slip into your code base! (Requires Husky)

choices.title: Nano Staged
choices.description: Tiny tool to run commands for modified, staged, and committed files in a GIT repository. (Requires Husky)

choices.title: ESlint + Type Information
choices.description: Enable ESLint rules that require type information.

choices.title: Trigger.dev
choices.description: The open source background jobs platform.

choices.title: Tanstack Query
choices.description: Powerful asynchronous state management for TS/JS.
